summary: Soundboard capture of a fun show where Jerry and Bob swap verses on “I Know You Rider”; the recording is solid while the performance is a bit sloppy but enjoyable.
review: The Miller‑taped soundboard source delivers clear, listenable audio that fans appreciate. Onstage, Jerry Garcia and Bob Weir trade vocal lines during “I Know You Rider,” creating a playful vibe despite some noted sloppiness in the playing. Overall the show is viewed positively, though not flawless.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviews – one moderate (3★) noting minor performance sloppiness and a very positive (5★) endorsement – give an average impression of a good show with solid soundboard quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers thank Miller for the sounds; no complaints about clarity, suggesting a clean board recording.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Limited commentary; reviewers focus on the playful vocal exchange rather than overall set pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Swaps verses with Bob on ‘I Know You Rider’, adding fun to the performance.
band_member_comments.Bob: Shares vocal duties with Jerry on ‘I Know You Rider’, creating a lively moment.
